components.title: Lua Loader API
components.summary: Load loose Lua files and register require/Init hooks.

symbols.name: Lua_Loader.Load
symbols.summary: Trigger a load of a loose Lua file by dotted path (legacy pre-7.5 loader).

symbols.name: Register_OnLoad_Init
symbols.summary: Defer an Init function until after the game has loaded.

symbols.name: Register_Require_Response
symbols.summary: Expose a value to require() under a registered path (protected-UI safe).

symbols.name: Register_Require_With_Init
symbols.summary: Combination of Register_Require_Response + Register_OnLoad_Init.

components.title: Simple Menu API
components.summary: Build standalone menus and Extension Options entries from MD scripts.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_API.Create_Menu
symbols.summary: Open a new standalone menu, closing any others.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_API.Add_Row
symbols.summary: Add a row to the open menu.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_API.Make_Text
symbols.summary: Add a text widget to the current row.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_API.Register_Options_Menu
symbols.summary: Register a menu under the standard Extension Options page.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_API.Reloaded
symbols.summary: Signalled when the menu backend (re)loads — re-register here.

symbols.name: md.Simple_Menu_Options.Register_Option
symbols.summary: Register a single button/slider option in the Extension Options menu.

components.title: Interact Menu API
components.summary: Add custom right-click (interact) menu actions from MD.

symbols.name: md.Interact_Menu_API.Get_Actions
symbols.summary: Signalled when an interact menu opens — add actions in response.

symbols.name: md.Interact_Menu_API.Add_Action
symbols.summary: Add a custom action with a callback cue.

components.title: Named Pipes API
components.summary: Two-way IPC with an external process via Windows named pipes.

symbols.name: Named_Pipes.xml
symbols.summary: MD wrapper for reading/writing named pipes (X4 acts as client).

symbols.name: Pipe_Server_Host
symbols.summary: Register a Python module with the external pipe host server.

components.title: Hotkey API
components.summary: Register custom hotkeys (key capture via the external pipe server).

symbols.name: md.Hotkey_API.Register_Action
symbols.summary: Register a hotkey action that appears in the controls menu.

symbols.name: md.Hotkey_API.Register_Key
symbols.summary: Directly bind a key/combination to a registered action.

symbols.name: md.Hotkey_API.Reloaded
symbols.summary: Signalled when the hotkey backend (re)loads — re-register here.

components.title: Time API
components.summary: Real-time timers/alarms that keep running while the game is paused.

symbols.name: 'Time.getEngineTime'
symbols.summary: Get seconds since X4 booted (captured via event_ui_triggered screen "Time").
symbols.scaffold:
<raise_lua_event name="'Time.getEngineTime'" param="'my_id'" />
<!-- capture: <event_ui_triggered screen="'Time'" control="'my_id'" /> -> event.param3 -->

symbols.name: 'Time.setAlarm'
symbols.summary: Fire an alarm after a delay in seconds (works while paused).

symbols.name: 'Time.startTimer'
symbols.summary: Start a named timer instance.

symbols.name: 'Time.getTimer'
symbols.summary: Read accumulated time on a named timer.
